creator: mark@foster.cc
text:
Unfortunately this patchset no longer applies to the port version 0.2.4.1.
I attempted to make it work by applying the bits piecemeal but in the end

mt-daapd-0.2.4-cp932.patch fails to apply clean.

So, please close as incomplete or cannot fix.

Thanks and sorry.


-- 
Said one park ranger, 'There is considerable overlap between the 
 intelligence of the smartest bears and the dumbest tourists.'
Mark D. Foster, CISSP <mark@foster.cc>  http://mark.foster.cc/
